1.description: Map of opioid prescriptions. This figure plots the distribution of opioid prescriptions per enrollee across U.S. counties based on opioid prescription rates from MarketScan over the period 2001–2010.

2.description: Laws to limit opioid abuse. This figure plots the distribution of laws intended to limit opioid abuse. Green represents states that passed at least one law during the period 2016 through 2018, and blue represents states without such legislation.
